name: Neovim & LazyVim
description: Installs Neovim and bootstraps LazyVim headlessly for instant use.

configRepo.description: The Git repository containing your LazyVim configuration (SSH or HTTPS).

extras.description: Comma-separated list of LazyVim extras to enable (e.g., lazyvim.plugins.extras.lang.typescript,lazyvim.plugins.extras.coding.copilot).
